definitions.usage_example: Although it was cold, I went out.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Although it was cold, I went out.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A pesar del hecho de que; aunque.]
definitions.usage_context_es: In spite of the fact that; even though.

definitions.usage_example: Though it was cold, I went out.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Though it was cold, I went out.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Una versión menos formal de 'although'.]

definitions.usage_example: He is rich. He is not happy, though.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is rich. He is not happy, though.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como adverbio al final de una oración, significando 'sin embargo'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an adverb at the end of a sentence, meaning 'however'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Aunque / A pesar de que]
definitions.usage_example: Even though it was cold, I went out.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE even though AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Even though it was cold, I went out.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Una versión más fuerte y enfática de 'although'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A stronger, more emphatic version of 'although'.

definitions.usage_example: This car is cheap. On the other hand, it is very old.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE on the other hand AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: This car is cheap. On the other hand, it is very old.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir un punto de vista o hecho que contrasta.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a contrasting point of view or fact.

definitions.usage_example: He is rich. However, he is not happy.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is rich. However, he is not happy.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir una declaración que contrasta con algo dicho previamente.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a statement that contrasts with something said previously.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Como sea / De cualquier manera]
definitions.usage_example: However you look at it, it's a bad situation.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: However you look at it, it's a bad situation.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: De cualquier forma o manera.]

definitions.usage_example: He likes coffee, while I prefer tea.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He likes coffee, while I prefer tea.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para contrastar dos hechos o situaciones diferentes.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to contrast two different facts or situations.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I read while I wait.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Durante el tiempo que; al mismo tiempo que.]
definitions.usage_context_es: During the time that; at the same time as.

definitions.usage_example: I will stay home, unless it stops raining.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I will stay home, unless it stops raining.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir una condición negativa (igual a 'si... no').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a negative condition (same as 'if... not').

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Siempre y cuando / Con tal de que]
definitions.usage_example: You can go, as long as you finish your homework.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE as long as AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: You can go, as long as you finish your homework.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir una condición que debe ser verdad para que la cláusula principal lo sea.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a condition that must be true for the main clause to be true.

definitions.usage_example: You need to study hard; otherwise, you will fail.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: You need to study hard; otherwise, you will fail.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En circunstancias diferentes a las presentes o consideradas.]
definitions.usage_context_es: In circumstances different from those present or considered.
